bars.name: LeVeL33
bars.description: World's highest urban microbrewery, craft beers brewed on-site, great Marina Bay views

bars.name: OUE Sky
bars.description: 4 concepts: HighHouse restaurant and lounge (L61–62) with Pan-Asian food, immersive art and DJ sets; Nova rooftop bar (L63) — Singapore's highest bar, 360° views, ASTRA star installation, open-air dancing
bars.notes: Also has private karaoke room and champagne room

bars.name: Brass Lion Distillery
bars.description: Singapore's first craft gin distillery, tours + tasting flights

bars.name: Tanglin Gin Distillery
bars.description: Award-winning gin in a Dempsey Hill colonial setting, bar and food on-site

clubs.name: Marquee
clubs.description: Singapore's biggest club, indoor Ferris wheel + slide, big international DJs

clubs.name: Cé La Vi
clubs.description: Restaurant, sky bar, club lounge and open sky deck — Singapore skyline at your feet

areas.name: Telok Ayer
areas.vibe: Trendy bar street, next to H-Kore
